feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Community
feed.subtitle: SAP Community Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Difference between Gl balances and asset history AR02
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

While extracting FAR register from AR02 & than comparing its depreciation for the year balance with GL`s

6 Million difference is coming. While thoroughly checking just discovered that some asset`s depreciation balance is occurring more in FAR and less in GL ? Please suggest the way forward.

entry.title: Can you provide suggestions for migrating data from SAP R/3 (4.7) to SAP S/4HANA Cloud (public)?
entry.content:
Hi ,
Aside from the staging table approach, can data migration be achieved using standard iFlows in SAP Cloud Platform Integration, or would we need to create custom iFlows or custom programs for this purpose?

Are there any other methods or third-party tools that can be used?

entry.title: External cash desk - CashPointPaymentCreateNotification_In
entry.content:
Hello,

We are using external cash desk for posting collection from customers through middleware. We are using  "CashPointPaymentCreateNotification_In" service for posting collection. The service is asynchronous and hence it gets collection posted however, we are not getting response against it. 

Do we have any option to make it synchronous instead of asynchronous service so that we can provide response with reference to the collection received through middelware.

Please let me know is there any option.

Regards,

Narendra

entry.title: Assign multiple Sales Employee to a Business Partner, Sales Order, AR Invoice, etc.?
entry.content:
Hello.

I have SAP B1 V10 SQL.

We have almost a hundred sales people with some Client Business Partners being assigned multiple Sales Employees.  These sales employees receive commissions.  We also have some employees who are 'servicing' the site but do not receive commissions.

My question(s):

  1. is there any way to tag multiple (2, 3, 4, or even 5) sales person to a BP, SO, AR Invoice, etc.?  (for commissions purposes)
  2. is there any way to duplicate that Sales Employee box (and its multiple tagging ability) and label the new box "Servicing Employee".  This way we can identify who is/are responsible for servicing the site but do not receive commissions.  (there is also a 'Technicians' field, but that is limited to one value, and does not directly draw off of the same list as Sales Employee)

I've seen other postings on this forum suggesting creating a second commissions box to handle two sales employees who receive commissions. But this solution would not work for us for the reasons below:

  • Each box is still limited to one value/Sales Employee & we could have up to five sales employees. per business partner.
  • If we had the two box types (multiple boxes for each of sales employees + service employees), it would be significantly more complex.
  • searching in SAP would be too cumbersome if there were too many boxes to search

So, that's my challenge and I'm hoping some experts can help.

entry.title: Lançamento de remessas
entry.content:
Boa tarde, 

Prezados vocês que conhecem o lançamento de simples remessa, qual janela do SAP vocês utilizam para lançar- las, a aba VA31 serve para esse tipo de lançamento?

entry.title: Scripting Tracker - SAP Window not found
entry.content: Hello, I've used the Scripting Tracker for many years and very much appreciate the tool and it's capabilities.  I figured out today that I'm using a super old version (2.30), but it still works great, with the exception of an issue I ran into today that I've never seen before.  I click on the "Scan scripting objects of all sessions (Alt+S)" button and it's not finding the window I'm working in at the moment.  I've got many SAP systems and it works on most, but I've only run into this for the first time today.  Is this something anyone else has seen before?  Thanks, in advance!

entry.title: Cannot join any group
entry.content:
Hi,

I just joined the SAP Community and have been trying to join the Beginner's corner and Welcome Group, but I keep getting error messages when trying to post or join any group like below:

Node was not found

  • The core node you are trying to access was not found, it may have been deleted. Please refresh your original page and try the operation again.

or

You do not have sufficient privileges for this resource or its parent to perform this action.

Click your browser's Back button to continue.

 

Could someone please help? It'd be greatly appreciated.

entry.title: Cash discount clearing acct 403 must have Ol Tr management - change acct
Journal Entry Analyzer
entry.content:
Hello Team, 

My client wants a group of users to see specific G/L accounts in the Journal Entry Analyzer app. 
Can anyone know if this is possible and if yes how it can be?

Kind regards,
Andreas

entry.title: capacity planning table
entry.content:
We have one requirement to align the the data from the columns from cm21 results screen.

ex. operation quantity columns data is align to left we want this to align on right side.

I have tried this using cy38 but I am unable to align it to right side, please help.

Thanks and Regards,

Ds

entry.title: Private messenger option is not active in my account
entry.content:
Hello everyone,
could anyone tell me that why am i not getting the messages and chat option on my community portal. I have attached the photo. 
appreciate your helping hands.

entry.title: Re-triggering Approval Flow Only on Price Increase for PO/Requisition
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

We have a situation for both Purchase Orders (POs) and Purchase Requisitions (PRs) in our SAP MM module. Currently, when a change is made after a PO/PR has already been released, it re-triggers the approval flow regardless of the nature of the change.

We need to configure the system so that the approval flow is re-triggered only if the total PO/PR price has increased after the release.

Has anyone encountered a similar requirement and can provide guidance on how to achieve this?

Instead of using the traditional release procedure configuration, we are looking to leverage the Flexible Workflow. Specifically, we need:

  1. Guidance on setting up Flexible Workflow to re-trigger the approval process only when the total PO/PR price increases.
  2. Steps to configure conditions within the flexible workflow to handle this scenario.
  3. Any necessary BAdI implementations or enhancements to support this requirement.

Any detailed instructions, examples, or references to documentation would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you for your assistance!

Best regards,
VIJAY RAWAL (SAP MM)

SAP S/4HANA SAP S/4HANA Cloud, extended edition SAP Community  SAP S/4HANA Cloud for Sourcing and Procurement MM Purchasing #Release Strategy #BAdI (Business Add-Ins) #Release Strategy #Approval Process #Flexible Workflow

entry.title: How analyse the error displayed in abst
entry.content:
Values as per ledger not reconcile with asset register

On executing the tcode abst it is displaying some assets code and in line content it showing as assets value not updated correctly,

Pl guide how to resolve this

entry.title: Is there a way to identify how long or when an MRP exception message was created?
entry.content: For example, if we have a sales order for a purchase to order material and there is a corresponding open PO.  Let say the sales order is later cancelled.  As there is no longer any demand, we'll get an MRP Exception message of '20'.  Is there a table that shows when the MRP exception message was created?  We want to use that date to find messages created from previous day so we can immediately contact our suppliers to cancel the PO.

entry.title: SAC - Geo Map - Drill Down Issue
entry.content:
Hello,

Recently I created a Geo Map in SAC. For this I created a Dimension which is associated to my dataset in Datasphere on 5 levels (Country, Region, State, City, Postal-Code). This association adds the special hana.ST-POINT field which is the geo point used for the Geo Map

Now for a certain example I see weird behavior. When drilling down in SAC to the from Country to Sub-Region 2 (=City), I see no problem. But then when drilling down on the City of Sint-Niklaas in Belgium (Postal code 9100,9110 & 9120) the following happens: 

(Same happens for bubble as well as chloropleth and all types of visualizations)

When I look in my dimension I see that Postal code 9100 also has a location in Italy. It seems that SAC only looks at that level and takes one of the geo points from the association where postal code = 9100 and uses that:

It seems that SAC does not look at all the fields in the association to determine the correct geo point. And so I would assume this issue will happen again for other equal postal codes? The measure that is used does however show the correct number, but put on the wrong location.

My association in datasphere:

Anyone had a similar issue in the past? Looking forward for solutions/ thoughts. 🤔

Kind Regards,

Thibault

entry.title: S4 Hana imple completed in 2022 and now client want to activate Indian Income tax depreciation
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

One of my client has already implemented S4Hana in 2021 -2022 and all the legacy data loaded and completed. But now they want to go for Implementation of Indian Income Tax Depreciation for the Assets is it possible?

Kindly help

Regards,

Sandeep

entry.title: Assistance Required for Selective Schema Import in SAP HANA
entry.content:
Greetings,

I am currently managing two databases. The first is named "SAP_Live", and the second is referred to as the "RFID_Live" schema. Within some of the stored procedures and functions, there is a reference to the "RFID_Live" schema, even though these procedures are housed within the "SAP_Live" database.

When performing an export of the "SAP_Live" schema from the SAP HANA system, it inadvertently includes the backup of the "RFID_Live" database as well.

My objective is to import only the "SAP_Live" schema, excluding the "RFID_Live" schema.

Thank you,
Rahul Jain

entry.title: Scheduling agreeement - Delivery schedule
entry.content:
Hello Dear sapistes; 

In a migration process of scheduling agreement, some delivery schedules are not fixed but once i migrate it the field get ticked and i have no possibility to edite it and un-check it.

Do you have any suggestion on how to can i un-check it please?

 

Thank you in advance

entry.title: SAP Workflow CustomAttributeData
entry.content:
Is there anyone who tried to add a CustomAttributeData on the Workflow?

Am I right that in order to add a field in the CustomAttributeData you should add the field in the Task's Attributes tab? 

In order to check the changes, I must create a new instance, right? As the existing instance will not be affected of the changes made.

Thank you in advance!

entry.title: Different steps involved in execution of a T-code.
entry.content:
Whenever we execute a T-code the below sequence of steps will be executed.
 
1. The SAP will check whether the T-code is given by the user is valid or not using the table TSTC.
   If the T-code is valid then it will proceed to 2nd step otherwise SAP system will throw a message 
   saying that the T-code is not valid one.
 
2. In this step the system will check whether T-code has been locked or not.
   If the T-code is locked then the system will throw a error message saying that T-code is locked using
   SM01 T-code. If the T-code has not been locked then it will proceed to next step. 
 
3.In this step the system will check whether the user buffer contains all the authorizations for executing
  the T-code . If the user buffer contains the authorization then it will proceed to next step.
 
  Sometime even though the user having the corresponding role he is not executing the T-code in that cases we can go
  resetting the user buffer.
 
4. In this step the system will check whether the auth. object S_TCODE contains all the field value as a transaction.
   If the T-code is present then it is going to display the initial screen for the T-code.
 
5. Once we get the initial screen if we want to perform anything we need the corresponding authorization values in the user profile.
